body: PT Modernland Realty Tbk (MDLN) shareholders approved a plan to submit over 50% of the company's total assets as loan collateral, with 99.99% of present shareholders representing 8.55 million shares voting in favor. The company's total assets stood at IDR 13.56 trillion, with marketing sales reaching IDR 855.06 billion from January to September 2024, led by the residential segment contributing IDR 648.34 billion.
title: PT Modernland Realty shareholders approve plan to use over 50% of company assets as loan collateral.

body: Tron (TRX) aims to boost competitiveness by optimizing solutions for its existing user base and introducing new innovations, with a focus on expanding into defense, healthcare, education, and mining sectors. The company plans to implement automation and artificial intelligence to increase productivity, and develop an integrated payment system in the Greater Jakarta area, expecting this strategy to drive business growth and reinforce its market competitiveness.
title: Tron to Boost Competitiveness with Innovative Solutions and Expanded Reach into Key Sectors.
